use_cases: Animated hero headlines with letter-flip hover effects
Interactive navigation links with gradient text transitions
Landing page typography with staggered letter animations
Interactive text displays for creative portfolios
Engaging call-to-action text with hover reveals
ai_summary: A text animation component featuring letter-flip hover effects using framer-motion. The component renders individual characters that animate vertically on hover with staggered timing, creating a reveal effect. Features vibrant gradient text (indigo to pink), glass-morphism badge styling, dark mode support, and smooth easing transitions. Ideal for creating engaging hero headlines, animated navigation links, or interactive typography displays in landing pages and creative portfolios.
